workstreams.scope: NAMESPACE/man via roxygen2; DESCRIPTION tweaks (e.g. pak); R CMD check unblock
tests/testthat + tests/testthat.R — internal helpers and smoke tests

policies.renv_pak: Project .Rprofile sets options(renv.config.pak.enabled = TRUE). CI should set RENV_CONFIG_PAK_ENABLED=true when using setup-renv.
policies.language: User-facing prose: Australian English; keep API identifiers stable.
policies.merge_order: After subagents: reconcile any overlap (e.g. DESCRIPTION only touched by main).
policies.git_flow: Upstream integration branch is dev (not develop). Branch feature/* from dev, open PRs into dev with gh pr create --base dev. Use release/* only when cutting a release to master.
policies.releases: Version bumps, NEWS entries, and GitHub tags only for notable iterations per CONTRIBUTING (R Packages lifecycle). Day-to-day merges to dev do not require a version change.
policies.pkgdown_url: https://acad-uofa.github.io/PolyLinkR/ — update DESCRIPTION URL if organisation changes Pages host.
policies.github_pages: Enabled (2026); site serves from gh-pages per pkgdown workflow.
policies.agent_followup: Follow-up: inst/extdata/tiny_polylinkR + expanded tests; vignettes inputs-formats, parallel-and-seeds, legacy-polylinkr; _pkgdown reference S3 group.
